Helmet of Rallos Zek  
 

Lore Item
Slot: HEAD
AC: 55
STR: +15 DEX: +15 STA: +15 HP: +100
SV MAGIC: +15
Effect: Truesight (Worn, Casting Time: Instant)
WT: 1.0 Size: TINY
Class: WAR
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)
Helmet of Rallos Zek
Lore Item
Slot: HEAD
AC: 55
STR: +15 DEX: +15 STA: +15 HP: +100
SV MAGIC: +15

WT: 1.0 Size: TINY

*This item is the result of a raid event.
Expansion: Scars of Velious
Average Price: 12,000pp Pricing Data...
Rarity: Ultra Rare
Level to Attain: 60
[Drops | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Kael Drakkel
NPC Name
The Avatar of War


Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Kael Drakkel

not to hard

# Jun 21 2004 at 3:21 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591806174509
11 posts
you know whats really funny? these old posts say he is "really hard to kill" bah. there are three guilds on my server (Kane Bayle)that i know can 1 group him easy, maybe more. things change dont they...

not to hard
QuoteReply
# Feb 25 2015 at 1:33 PM Rating: Decent

Scholar
44 posts
you know whats really funny? these old posts say he is "there are guilds that i know can 1 group him easy"

# Jun 28 2005 at 9:23 AM Rating: Decent
laink
398 posts
If you actually considered what the state of the game was back when the people saying he's a hard kill, which he is for people who aren't geared 5 or 6 expansions past him, and you'd find that they are mostly before PoP came out and the people saying it after pop came out are generally referring to taking him with people who'd actively want the loot he'd drop for their main not alts.

I was wondering if this helm can be customized via the quests from Velious? If anyone has any info it would be appreciated. I love this piece of armor.
▲ Page top
RE: Customizable
QuoteReply
# Jun 17 2003 at 10:38 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1592255385306
Scholar
38 posts
No, it cannot. Crown of the Kromzek Kings, Cowl of Mortality, and velious plate quest helms can be customized, however.
▲ Page top
Highest AC is BP of Rallos...I THINK NOT!!!
QuoteReply
# May 29 2002 at 5:14 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591779267162
46 posts
There are now confimed drops of a 70ac and 80ac Cloaks in Vex Thall along with 65-80ac BP's in those areas as well. I don't know the "soft cap" on ac but I've seen warriors with ac of 1700. Seems unbelievable but true. Bah, I'm only at 1100! So the highest ac item in ga,e is no longer Cheastplate of Fiery Might or Breastplate of Rallos Zek (If there is one I haven't seen one yet). Well, there ya go. A little clarification for the masses. ;)


Lesan Bloodrain
58th Season Troll Myrmidon
Rallso Zek
▲ Page top
RE: Highest AC is BP of Rallos...I THINK NOT!!!
QuoteReply
# Oct 14 2002 at 8:42 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592252678401
341 posts
There is no breastplate of rallos zek. It was a fake item. Though with PoP comming out and we'll be able to kill Rallos Zek himself, maybe VI will make one? Shrug. Who knows what verant is up to, btw very nice helm, grats to the warriors who get it and the guild who kills this mob. Know it'll be awhile before I get my hands on it. Only time it won't go to a warrior is if all the warriors in the guild who kills this mob allready have the helm then they'll probably random the helm. :P

# Aug 21 2003 at 11:37 PM Rating: Default

From the plane of power expantion there are some 100ac bp's out now!
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Nov 16 2002 at 11:14 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) ever heard of "Great Shadow Platemail" dumbasses? 80 ac bp.
Chestplate of Zek
QuoteReply
# Jan 24 2002 at 12:53 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1593361980591
1 post
For the person who asked. Yes the Avatar of War drops the Chestplate of Zek. Adds higher numbers on the same stats that the Chestplate of Vindication (off Derakor the Vindicator) and Chestplate of Eradication (off Statue of Rallos Zek) do. It's sort of like a heirarchy on those 3 mobs, one spawns after the next one dies and each harder mob drops similar but upgraded versions of the same loot (at least in terms of the BP's) The AC on the Chestplate of Zek is 75. Right now thats the highest AC ever on a BP, but not the highest AC in the game on any one item.
▲ Page top
RE: Chestplate of Zek
QuoteReply

88 posts
aye it was a fake; highest ac bp is heavy yttrium breastplate, followed I believe by Jieney's two-tone cuirass.

before they spawned the AoW. He is quite a hard
kill though.

__DEL__1591767672889
13 posts
Vulak'Aerr drops some very high AC items as well. Seen the shield drop once and the axe twice. Not sure if this is correct, but I haven't seen anything yet, first hand that is, with higher AC then these two items.

Palladius Axe of Slaughter
LORE ITEM MAGIC ITEM NO DROP
Damage: 51
Delay: 42
Ratio: 0.823 Godly
AC: +80 Str: +25 Sta: +25 Agi: +25 Dex: +25 Magic Resist: +10 Fire Resist: +10 Cold Resist: +10 Poison Resist: +10 Disease Resist: +10 HP: +100 Mana: +50
Weight: 15.0
Weapon Skill: Two Hand Slash
Classes: Paladin Shadowknight Warrior
Races: All Races
Inventory Slot: Primary Melee
Effect: Strike of the Chosen
Type: Triggered
Charges: Unlimited

Yakatizma's Shield of Crafting
LORE ITEM MAGIC ITEM NO DROP
AC: +75 Str: +15 Sta: +15 Wis: +15 Magic Resist: +15 Fire Resist: +15 Cold Resist: +15 Poison Resist: +15 Disease Resist: +15 HP: +100 Mana: +100
Weight: 2.0
Classes: Cleric Shaman
Races: All Races
Inventory Slot: Secondary Melee

Spuzy
